description: WebSocket connection establishment failure patterns in Claude Instance Manager

failureSignatures.errorPattern: ws.onerror = (error) => { console.error('WebSocket error:', error); setError('WebSocket connection error'); }

failureSignatures.userImpact: Cannot send messages to Claude instances

rootCauses.detection: URL replacement logic in line 42: apiUrl.replace('http', 'ws')
WebSocket handshake failure in browser console
rootCauses.configuration: Server CORS settings for WebSocket connections

rootCauses.cause: Network proxy or firewall blocking WebSocket connections

preventionStrategies.implementation: Add /api/health endpoint check before WebSocket connection
preventionStrategies.code: const healthCheck = await fetch(`${apiUrl}/api/health`); if (!healthCheck.ok) throw new Error('Backend not available');

preventionStrategies.implementation: Replace setTimeout with exponential backoff retry logic
Validate URL format before connection attempt
Implement HTTP polling fallback when WebSocket fails

detectionMechanisms.implementation: Monitor WebSocket readyState and connection events
Check connection state before message sending
Regular ping messages to detect connection health

userExperienceImpact.symptom: Button clicks result in no response or error messages
userExperienceImpact.visibility: Error state displayed in UI header
userExperienceImpact.fallback: Manual refresh required, no automatic recovery UX
userExperienceImpact.severity: Blocks core functionality - cannot interact with Claude instances

testingRecommendations.scenario: Simulate network disconnection during active WebSocket session
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Graceful error handling and automatic reconnection

testingRecommendations.scenario: Start frontend with backend service stopped
testingRecommendations.expectedBehavior: Clear error message and retry mechanism

testingRecommendations.scenario: Block WebSocket connections via proxy/firewall simulation

unitTests: Message sending validation with connection checks
Error state management and UI updates
integrationTests: Message flow between frontend and backend WebSocket
e2eTests: Complete user workflow with WebSocket connectivity issues

nldMetadata.calculationMethod: (User Success Rate: 0.30 / Claude Confidence: 0.90) * TDD Factor: 0.75 = 0.25
nldMetadata.tddUsage: Limited - Basic error handling present but no comprehensive test coverage
nldMetadata.neuralTrainingStatus: Exported for claude-flow neural pattern training
